name: Code editor accepts typed input and shows line numbers
description: When the user types into the code editor textarea, the editor content updates and the line-number gutter on the side updates to reflect the number of lines.

planSteps.description: Verify the code editor is visible with a line-number gutter on the side
Click inside the code editor textarea to focus it
Press Ctrl+A (or Cmd+A) to select all existing code, then press Delete to clear the editor
Type a simple HTML snippet into the editor: a div tag containing hello world text
Verify the editor content now shows the newly typed HTML code
Verify the line-number gutter on the side updated to reflect the new line count of the typed code
